import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import PhoneFrame from "../components/PhoneFrame"; const ModeSelect = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); return (
navigate("/")}>← Back travelblurry
How would you like to plan?
Kolkata → Manali · 5 days · ₹15,000
navigate("/loading")}>
Recommended
Skip to final plan
We'll automatically build the best trip within your budget. View and edit anytime.
Saves ~3 minutes
navigate("/travel")}>
Customize step-by-step
Pick your transport, stay, food preference, and local travel. Full control of every detail.
4 quick steps · 5–8 min
You can always edit the final plan after generation
 ); }; export default ModeSelect;
